title: Year 7 Health & Physical Education: Sustainability Challenge
subject: Health & Physical Education
culturalContext: Māori cultural knowledge and Aotearoa context
learningObjectives: Develop deep understanding of health & physical education concepts in cultural context
Apply traditional knowledge to modern health & physical education challenges
Analyze environmental impacts through health & physical education frameworks
Engage with community perspectives on health & physical education issues
activities: Cultural mapping and health & physical education analysis
Traditional knowledge workshop and health & physical education integration
Environmental investigation using health & physical education methods
Community interview project on health & physical education applications
Sustainability challenge with health & physical education solutions
Cultural artifact study through health & physical education lens
resources: Cultural knowledge databases and health & physical education resources
Traditional knowledge holders and health & physical education experts
Environmental monitoring tools and health & physical education software
Community engagement platforms and health & physical education forums
Sustainability assessment frameworks and health & physical education models
assessment: Cultural competency evaluation through health & physical education projects
nzcAlignment: Te Tiriti o Waitangi and its applications
